title: Dungeons Dummy Item
description: Changes the texture of the Dummy item to that of the MC dungeons texture (MmmMmmMmmMmm Target Dummy mod)
body:
# Dungeons Dummy Item
### ⚠️Requires the [MmmMmmMmmMmm Target Dummy Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/Adega8YN) by MehVahdJukaar
______________________________________________________________________________________________

🔎 This is a simple resource pack that changes the texture of the Target Dummy item to match the minecraft dungeons style texture that can be set in the config. 
This is for people who want the item to match the dummy
______________________________________________________________________________________________
### 📄 Mod Config used with this resource pack:                                                                                     
dummmmmmy-client.toml                                                                             
Skin used by the dummy                                                                         
Allowed Values: DEFAULT, ORIGINAL, ALTERNATIVE, DUNGEONS                                           
texture = "DUNGEONS"
______________________________________________________________________________________________
### 🖋️ Credits
MmmMmmMmmMmm created by [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) and [Plantkillable](https://modrinth.com/user/Plantkillable)
